方法：BioFINDER-1およびBioFINDER-2コホートから、SCD診断を受けた469名（平均年齢69.1歳、女性51.4%）を対象に、認知機能評価、血漿中p-tau217などのバイオマーカー、画像診断を組み合わせた多面的なリスク評価を行い、平均4年間の追跡で認知症進行を観察した。  
結果：84名が認知症へ進行し、そのうち66.7%がアルツハイマー型認知症であった。進行者は非進行者より高齢であり、認知機能低下や血漿p-tau217の上昇が認知症リスクの有意な予測因子であった。  
結論：認知機能評価、血漿p-tau217、画像診断を組み合わせた臨床的に実施可能な多モーダルアプローチは、SCD患者の将来の認知症リスク評価に有用であり、早期介入や臨床試験の対象選定に役立つ可能性が示された。
items.summary_short_ja: 主観的認知低下（SCD）は軽度認知障害や認知症のリスク状態であり、本研究はBioFINDERコホートの469名を対象に、認知機能評価、血漿中p-tau217、画像バイオマーカーを組み合わせた多面的な指標で認知症進行リスクを検討した。約4年間で84名が認知症に進行し、高齢や特定バイオマーカーの異常がリスク上昇と関連した。これにより早期介入や臨床試験の選択に有用なリスク層別化法が示された。

items.title: Differences in Survival Associated With the First Antiseizure Medication in People With Dementia and Epilepsy.
items.abstract: Epilepsy is an increasingly recognized comorbidity in neurocognitive disorders. Although experts recommend newer antiseizure medications (ASMs), whether there are real-world benefits of selecting particular ASMs for epilepsy in dementia remains unknown. Our objective was to examine whether different ASMs are associated with differences in survival in persons with epilepsy and dementia. A cohort study was conducted using Swedish national registers. We included individuals with dementia who received ASM treatment after a diagnosis of epilepsy after January 1, 2006. Data were analyzed until December 2023. Dispensed ASMs (Anatomical Therapeutic Code N03) were used to identify treatment; patients were categorized as starting one of the 4 most common ASMs (carbamazepine, levetiracetam, lamotrigine, valproate) or other ASMs. Recurrent prescriptions were used to determine treatment duration. Associations between all-cause death and ASMs were assessed by Cox proportional hazards regression. We also assessed causes of death and the risk of cardiovascular death. In Sweden, between 2006 and 2023, we included 5,764 individuals (2,811 men [48.8%] and 2,953 women [51.2%]) using their first ASM after a diagnosis of epilepsy and dementia. Carbamazepine (n = 1,578) was the most common ASM before 2015 and levetiracetam (n = 2098) most common thereafter. In Kaplan-Meier analyses and Cox regression models adjusting for age, sex, year of ASM start, and comorbidities, valproate (n = 746) was associated with increased adjusted hazard ratio (aHR) of death (1.34, 95% CI 1.20-1.48), in contrast to lamotrigine (n = 922, aHR: 0.84, 95% CI 0.75-0.93) and levetiracetam (n = 2098, aHR: 0.93, 95% CI 0.85-1.03). The risks were similar in analyses using restricted mean survival time, propensity score-matched sets of participants, balancing weights in regression models, and cases with epilepsy onset in existing dementia. Cardiovascular causes of death were more common among users of valproate or carbamazepine than among users of lamotrigine and levetiracetam. Compared with carbamazepine, valproate was associated with increased risk of cardiovascular death (aHR: 1.30; 95% CI 1.11-1.52) while lamotrigine (aHR 0.79; 95% CI 0.66-0.94) was associated with a reduced risk. In this population-wide cohort study, use of valproate was associated with the highest risk of death in persons with epilepsy and dementia. Lamotrigine and, in some models, levetiracetam were associated with better survival than both valproate and carbamazepine. This provides real-world support for existing expert guidelines.
items.summary_ja:
背景：認知症患者におけるてんかんは重要な併存症であり、新しい抗てんかん薬（ASM）が推奨されているが、実際の生存率への影響は不明であった。  
方法：スウェーデンの全国登録データを用い、2006年以降に認知症とてんかんと診断されASM治療を開始した5,764人を対象に、カルバマゼピン、レベチラセタム、ラモトリギン、バルプロ酸の4種とその他のASMの生存率を比較。Cox比例ハザードモデルで全死因死亡および心血管死リスクを解析した。  
結果：バルプロ酸使用者は調整後ハザード比（aHR）1.34（95%CI 1.20-1.48）で死亡リスクが最も高く、ラモトリギン（aHR 0.84）およびレベチラセタム（aHR 0.93）は死亡リスクが低かった。心血管死はバルプロ酸およびカルバマゼピン使用者で多く、ラモトリギン使用者は心血管死リスクが低かった。  
結論：認知症とてんかん患者において、バルプロ酸の使用は死亡リスクを高める一方、ラモトリギンおよびレベチラセタムは生存率改善に寄与する。これらの結果は専門家のガイドラインを支持する実世界データを提供する。
items.summary_short_ja: 認知症とてんかんを併発する患者5,764名を対象に、最初に使用された抗てんかん薬（ASM）と生存率の関連を調査した。結果、バルプロ酸は死亡リスクを有意に増加させ（aHR 1.34）、心血管死のリスクも高かった。一方、ラモトリギンは死亡リスクを低減し（aHR 0.84）、カルバマゼピンやレベチラセタムよりも生存率が良好であった。これらの結果は専門家の推奨を支持する実証的証拠となる。

items.title: Characterizing Individuals Fulfilling Clinical Criteria for Limbic-Predominant Age-Related TDP-43 Encephalopathy in a Tertiary Memory Clinic.
items.abstract: Limbic-predominant age-related TDP-43 encephalopathy (LATE) is characterized by an amnestic- and limbic-predominant phenotype, which can mimic Alzheimer disease (AD). In a memory clinic cohort, we tested whether clinical criteria for LATE can detect a clinical profile of LATE that is distinct from AD. In this retrospective examination of a longitudinal memory clinic cohort from the Alzheimer Center Amsterdam, we included individuals with mild cognitive impairment (MCI) and dementia (aged >50 years). We classified individuals based on baseline data on cognition, atrophy, amyloid-status, and tau-status into Probable- and Possible-LATE, co-occurring LATE and AD (LATE-AD), and AD (without LATE). Next, we compared these groups on demographics, clinical features, cognition, and atrophy. Of 3,606 individuals (mean age at baseline 66 [SD 6], 49.2% female) available for classification, we classified 56 (1.6%) as Probable-LATE, 115 (3.2%) as Possible-LATE, 127 (3.5%) as LATE-AD, and 1,675 (46.5%) as AD. Individuals with Probable-LATE progressed slower than AD on mini-mental state examination (MMSE) (sβ [SE] = 0.12 [0.05],  Using an operationalization of clinical criteria for LATE, 8.2% of participants with MCI or dementia from our tertiary memory clinic were classified as Possible-LATE, Probable-LATE, or LATE-AD. Probable-LATE was characterized by a milder disease course than AD, whereas LATE-AD was characterized by a more aggressive disease course. This underscores the value of the proposed clinical criteria in identifying individuals with suspected LATE, who have distinct clinical trajectories from AD. Our findings, therefore, support the use of these criteria to improve diagnostic and prognostic accuracy in the memory clinic.
items.summary_ja:
背景：Limbic-predominant age-related TDP-43 encephalopathy（LATE）は、記憶障害や辺縁系優位の症状を示し、アルツハイマー病（AD）と類似することがある。  
方法：アムステルダムのアルツハイマーセンターの記憶クリニックに通う50歳以上の軽度認知障害（MCI）および認知症患者3,606名を対象に、認知機能、萎縮、アミロイドおよびタウの状態から臨床基準に基づきProbable-LATE、Possible-LATE、LATE-AD（LATEとADの併存）、AD（LATEなし）に分類し、各群の臨床特徴や認知機能、進行速度を比較した。  
結果：対象者の8.2%がPossible-LATE、Probable-LATE、またはLATE-ADに分類された。Probable-LATE群はAD群よりも認知機能低下の進行が緩やかであった一方、LATE-AD群はより進行が速かった。  
結論：LATEの臨床基準はADと異なる臨床経過を示す患者を特定でき、診断および予後予測の精度向上に有用であることが示された。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、三次記憶クリニックの認知障害患者を対象に、LATE（辺縁系優位加齢関連TDP-43脳症）の臨床基準を用いてAD（アルツハイマー病）と異なる臨床像を検証した。3,606例中8.2%がLATE関連群に分類され、Probable-LATEはADより進行が緩徐で、LATE-ADはより進行が速いことが示された。これにより、LATEの臨床基準は診断・予後の精度向上に有用であることが示唆された。

items.title: Cerebral "Dirty-Appearing" White Matter in Relation to Cognitive Decline and Dementia Risk in Community-Dwelling Older Adults.
items.abstract: Cerebral "dirty-appearing" or "diffusely abnormal" white matter (DAWM) represents subtle white matter abnormalities that are associated with progression of cerebral small vessel disease (cSVD), but the association with cognitive function and dementia is unclear. Our aim was to study the association between DAWM and cognitive function, long-term cognitive decline, and long-term dementia risk in community-dwelling older adults with limited baseline cSVD burden. Participants of the prospective Age-Gene/Environment Susceptibility-Reykjavik longitudinal cohort study underwent 1.5T brain MRI scans. DAWM was visually rated on baseline fluid-attenuated inversion recovery (FLAIR) MRI as a percentage of lobar white matter volume (0%, 0%-10%, 10%-25%, or >25% DAWM) per brain lobe. Baseline DAWM ratings and white matter hyperintensity (WMH) volumes were associated with memory, executive function, and processing speed cognitive domain  From 4,163 included participants, 2,081 participants were selected based on limited baseline WMH volume on FLAIR MRI (determined by a median split) (mean age: 74.6 ± 4.9 years, 61% female). Baseline DAWM ratings were not associated with baseline cognition  In contrast to WMH, DAWM was not associated with baseline cognition, long-term cognitive decline, nor long-term dementia risk in community-dwelling older adults with limited cSVD burden. Although DAWM is associated with progression of cSVD, its role in the development of cognitive impairment and dementia remains unclear.
items.summary_ja:
背景：脳の「汚れたように見える」白質（DAWM）は、脳小血管病（cSVD）の進行に関連する微細な白質異常であるが、認知機能や認知症との関連は不明である。  
方法：アイスランドの地域在住高齢者を対象とした前向きコホート研究で、1.5T MRIのFLAIR画像を用いてDAWMの割合を脳葉ごとに評価し、認知機能や長期的な認知低下、認知症リスクとの関連を検討した。対象は基準値以下の白質病変量を持つ2,081名（平均年齢74.6歳、女性61％）。  
結果：DAWMの割合はベースライン時の認知機能とは関連せず、白質高信号病変（WMH）とは異なり、長期的な認知低下や認知症リスクとも関連しなかった。  
結論：DAWMはcSVDの進行には関与するものの、認知機能障害や認知症発症における役割は明確でなく、さらなる研究が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、地域在住高齢者における「汚れたように見える」白質（DAWM）と認知機能・認知症リスクの関連を調査した。限られた脳小血管病変負荷の参加者2,081名を対象にMRI評価を行った結果、DAWMは認知機能や長期的な認知低下、認知症リスクとは関連しなかった。一方、白質病変（WMH）は認知機能と関連が認められた。DAWMの認知症発症への影響は依然として不明である。

items.title: Cognitive and Brain Reserve as Modifiers of Early Alzheimer Disease-Related Cognitive Vulnerability.
items.abstract: Maintaining cognitive function despite the presence of Alzheimer disease (AD) pathology is the foundation of cognitive reserve. Although the theory of cognitive reserve is strongly supported by empirical research, the field lacks standardized, validated methods for quantifying cognitive and brain reserve. We tested whether associations between AD pathology and cognitive function were modified by proxy measures of cognitive reserve (years of education, socioeconomic status; SES) and brain reserve (brain-predicted age difference, and a volumetric AD signature). We hypothesized that greater structural brain integrity, higher education, and higher SES would attenuate the association between greater AD pathology and poorer cognitive performance. This cross-sectional study analyzed baseline data from a multisite randomized clinical trial, which was conducted at 3 US universities and enrolled cognitively unimpaired, physically inactive, community-dwelling adults. AD pathology was measured via plasma assays for phosphorylated tau (p-tau)-217 in the whole cohort, and PET for β-amyloid (Aβ) in a subset of participants as a secondary analysis. The primary outcome of cognitive function was evaluated by a comprehensive cognitive assessment. SES was measured via the MacArthur Socioeconomic Status Index, and magnetic resonance imaging was used to calculate brain-predicted age difference (brain-PAD) and a volumetric AD signature. Data were analyzed using linear regression models with interaction terms for moderation analyses. A total of 621 participants (aged 69.9 ± 3.8, 71% female) had available data for the main analyses and 355 had PET Centiloid data available. Brain-PAD moderated the association between AD pathology (measured by p-tau217) and multiple cognitive domains, including episodic memory (β = -0.09 [-0.16 to -0.02]), processing speed (β = -0.08 [-0.15 to -0.01]), working memory (β = -0.10 [-0.18 to -0.03]), and executive function/attentional control (β = -0.08 [-0.15 to -0.01]). Specifically, the negative association of greater AD pathology with poorer cognition was weakest in individuals with younger appearing brains. A latent SES score also moderated the relationship between p-tau217 and episodic memory (β = 0.08 [0.01-0.16]), but this did not survive correction for multiple comparisons. Neither years of education nor the volumetric AD signature moderated pathology-cognition associations. These results support the hypothesis that higher cognitive and brain reserve may help buffer the cognitive consequences of AD pathology. Strategies to increase both cognitive and brain reserve could help to boost resilience against emerging AD pathology; however, longitudinal studies are needed to confirm these conclusions.
items.summary_ja:
背景：アルツハイマー病（AD）病理が存在しても認知機能を維持する認知予備力の理論は支持されているが、認知予備力や脳予備力の定量化には標準化された方法が不足している。  
方法：米国3大学で実施された多施設ランダム化臨床試験のベースラインデータ（621名、平均年齢約70歳）を用い、AD病理（血漿中p-tau217および一部でPETによるβ-アミロイド測定）と認知機能の関連が、認知予備力（教育年数、社会経済的地位：SES）および脳予備力（脳予測年齢差、AD体積指標）によって修飾されるかを検証した。  
結果：脳予測年齢差（brain-PAD）はp-tau217と複数の認知領域（エピソード記憶、処理速度、作業記憶、実行機能）との負の関連を緩和し、若く見える脳を持つ人ほどAD病理の認知影響が弱かった。SESもエピソード記憶に対する修飾効果を示したが、多重比較補正後は有意でなかった。教育年数やAD体積指標は修飾効果を示さなかった。  
結論：高い認知予備力および脳予備力はAD病理による認知機能低下を緩和する可能性があり、これらを高める戦略がADへの抵抗力向上に寄与する可能性がある。ただし、因果関係確認のため縦断研究が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、アルツハイマー病（AD）病理と認知機能の関連に対し、認知予備力（教育年数、社会経済的地位）および脳予備力（脳の予測年齢差、体積的AD指標）が修飾因子となるかを検証した。結果、脳の若々しさを示す指標がAD病理による認知低下の影響を緩和し、社会経済的地位も一部で影響を示したが、教育年数や体積的指標は影響しなかった。認知・脳予備力の向上がAD病理に対する認知的耐性を高める可能性が示唆される。

items.title: What Does a Positive Alzheimer Disease Blood-Based Biomarker Result Mean in People With Mild Cognitive Impairment?
items.abstract: Blood-based biomarkers (BBMs) for Alzheimer disease (AD) offer widely expanded access to biomarker-informed diagnoses in community settings that have previously lacked such resources. However, integrating them into current clinical diagnostic practice presents challenges, particularly in the diagnosis of mild cognitive impairment (MCI). Limited data are available to guide clinicians on when to test, how to counsel patients with MCI and a positive AD BBM result about their risk of dementia progression, or which evidence-based dementia prevention strategies or treatments to recommend. This Perspective article outlines the key challenges faced by clinicians and patients when addressing a diagnosis of "MCI due to AD" and offers suggestions for appropriate pretest counseling and future research directions to address current knowledge gaps.
items.summary_ja:
背景：アルツハイマー病（AD）の血液バイオマーカー（BBM）は、これまで診断資源が乏しかった地域でもバイオマーカーに基づく診断を可能にするが、軽度認知障害（MCI）の診断への統合には課題がある。  
方法：本論文は、MCI患者における陽性のAD BBM結果の意味を臨床医が理解し、適切に対応するための現状の問題点を整理し、検査前のカウンセリング方法や今後の研究課題を提案する視点論文である。  
結果：MCI患者に対する検査の適切なタイミングや、陽性結果を受けた患者への認知症進行リスクの説明、エビデンスに基づく予防策や治療の推奨に関するデータが不足していることが明らかとなった。  
結論：AD BBMの臨床導入には、患者への事前説明の標準化やリスク評価の明確化が必要であり、これらの知識ギャップを埋めるためのさらなる研究が求められる。
items.summary_short_ja: アルツハイマー病（AD）の血液バイオマーカー（BBM）は、これまで診断資源が乏しかった地域での診断機会を拡大するが、軽度認知障害（MCI）診断への統合には課題がある。特に、検査の適時性や陽性結果を持つMCI患者へのリスク説明、効果的な予防・治療法の推奨に関する指針が不足している。本論文はこれらの課題を整理し、適切な事前カウンセリングや今後の研究方向を提案している。

items.title: Cerebral Amyloid Angiopathy and Risk of Dementia in Patients With Cognitive Complaint.
items.abstract: The frequency and cognitive trajectory of cerebral amyloid angiopathy (CAA) in patients from memory clinics is uncertain. We aimed to determine whether patients with CAA have an increased risk of dementia in nondemented individuals presenting with a cognitive complaint. We retrospectively analyzed data of the MEMENTO prospective cohort that enrolled outpatients from 26 centers in France presenting with a cognitive complaint and a Clinical Dementia Rating (CDR) scale score ≤0.5. Participants aged >50 years who had interpretable baseline brain MRI were eligible for this study and followed every 6 months for 5 years with systematic assessment of dementia. Based on MRI analysis, participants were classified into 4 categories using the Boston criteria V2.0 and V1.5: probable CAA, possible CAA, deep/mixed small vessel disease (SVD), or controls (without imaging markers of SVD). The primary outcome was the progression to dementia (Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders, Fourth Revision criteria) evaluated by an expert committee. Cox proportional hazards models were used to determine hazard ratios (HRs) and CIs for the primary outcome. Of 2,323 MEMENTO participants, 2,136 (92%) were included in this study. The mean age (SD) at baseline was 71.3 (7.9) years and 1,320 (62%) were women. Probable CAA was diagnosed in 413 (19.3%) patients using the Boston criteria V2.0, and 144 (7.0%) using the Boston criteria V1.5. During a median follow-up of 5.0 years (interquartile range 3.1-5.1), 307 participants developed dementia. Compared with controls, patients with probable CAA according to the Boston criteria V2.0 (HR 1.73, 95% CI 1.23-2.42) and V1.5 (HR 2.23, 95% CI 1.56-3.20) had increased risk of dementia. After adjusting for age, sex, baseline Mini-Mental State Examination score and hippocampal volume, patients with probable CAA per Boston criteria V1.5 but not V2.0 had an increased risk of dementia compared with controls. This association was not significant when further adjusting with APOE ε4. CAA is a common condition in outpatients with mild cognitive symptoms. Patients with probable CAA according to the Boston criteria V1.5 but not V2.0 have increased risk of dementia. Further studies are required to externally validate these findings and evaluate potential mediation effect of APOE genotype.
items.summary_ja:
背景：記憶外来を受診した認知症でない認知機能低下訴え患者における脳アミロイド血管症（CAA）の頻度と認知機能経過は不明である。  
方法：フランスの26施設から認知機能低下を訴える50歳以上の外来患者2,136名を対象に、ベースライン脳MRIを解析し、Boston基準V2.0およびV1.5に基づき「確実なCAA」「可能なCAA」「深部/混合型小血管病変」「対照群」に分類。5年間隔6か月ごとに認知症発症を専門委員会が評価し、Cox比例ハザードモデルでリスクを解析した。  
結果：確実なCAAはBoston基準V2.0で19.3％、V1.5で7.0％に認められた。5年の追跡期間中に307名が認知症を発症。対照群と比較し、確実なCAA群は両基準で認知症リスクが有意に増加（V2.0：HR1.73、V1.5：HR2.23）。年齢・性別・MMSE・海馬体積調整後はV1.5基準のCAA群のみリスク増加が有意であったが、APOE ε4遺伝子型を加えた調整では有意差が消失した。  
結論：軽度認知症状患者においてCAAは一般的であり、Boston基準V1.5による確実なCAAは認知症リスク増加と関連する。APOE遺伝子型の影響を含めたさらなる検証が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 認知症を伴わない認知症状患者における脳アミロイド血管症（CAA）の頻度と認知機能の経過を検討した。フランスの26施設から2,136名を対象にMRIでCAAを評価し、5年間追跡した結果、Boston基準V1.5で診断された確実なCAA患者は認知症リスクが有意に増加したが、V2.0基準では調整後に有意差が消失した。CAAは軽度認知症状患者に多く、APOE遺伝子型の影響も示唆されるため、さらなる検証が必要である。

items.title: Association of 24-Hour Blood Pressure Variability With Cognition and Brain MRI Markers of Structural Change in Adults in Mid- to Late-Life.
items.abstract: Blood pressure (BP) fluctuates across the 24-hour period. High 24-hour BP variability (BPV) is associated with cardiovascular disease risk, yet its relevance for brain health is unclear. We aimed to examine associations between 24-hour BPV, cognition, and multimodal MRI markers of brain health, and whether these were modified by  In a cross-sectional study, dementia-free participants aged 55-80, from the community-based Brain and Cognitive Health (BACH) study in Melbourne, Australia, completed 24-hour ambulatory BP monitoring (ABPM) and hospital-based assessments: office BP, blood collection, neuropsychological testing, and brain MRI. ABPM variables included mean BP and coefficient of variation for 24-hour, awake, and asleep periods. Composites for global cognition and executive function were calculated. MRI markers included white matter hyperintensities (WMHs), brain volumetrics, cerebral blood flow, white matter free water, diffusion along the perivascular space, and blood-brain barrier water exchange rate. The primary outcomes were global cognition and WMH. We sought to partially replicate associations between ABPM and cognition in the HYpertension and gut PERmeability (HYPER) study, where cognition was assessed with the digital NIH Toolbox. Linear regressions were adjusted for demographic and vascular risk factors, with coefficients representing SD change in outcome per SD increase in exposure. In the BACH study (mean age = 67 years; 51% female; n = 225), higher 24-hour and awake BPV were associated with poorer global cognition (24-hour BPV: β = -0.152, 95% CI 0.278 to -0.027; awake BPV: -0.158, 95% CI -0.285 to -0.031) and executive function (24-hour BPV: β = -0.174, 95% CI-0.299 to -0.049; awake BPV: β = -0.168, 95% CI -0.294 to -0.042). items.summary_ja:
背景：血圧は24時間で変動し、その変動性（BPV）が心血管疾患リスクと関連することは知られているが、脳の健康への影響は不明である。  
方法：オーストラリアのコミュニティベースのBACH研究に参加した55～80歳の認知症非罹患者225名を対象に、24時間の血圧モニタリング（ABPM）、神経心理検査、脳MRIを実施した。血圧の平均値と変動係数を24時間、覚醒時、睡眠時で算出し、認知機能（全体認知と実行機能）とMRI指標（白質病変、脳容積、血流、血液脳関門の水交換率など）との関連を線形回帰で解析した。  
結果：24時間および覚醒時のBPVが高いほど、全体認知（β=-0.152、-0.158）と実行機能（β=-0.174、-0.168）が低下し、血液脳関門の機能障害とも関連した。  
結論：中高年成人において、24時間血圧変動の増加は認知機能低下および血液脳関門の障害と関連し、脳の健康維持におけるBPVの重要性が示唆された。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、55～80歳の認知症非罹患者を対象に24時間血圧変動（BPV）と認知機能および脳MRIマーカーの関連を検討した。結果、24時間および覚醒時のBPVが高いほど、全般的認知機能と実行機能が低下し、血液脳関門の機能障害と関連した。これらの知見は脳の構造的変化や認知機能低下におけるBPVの重要性を示唆している。

items.title: Effect of Cognitive Reserve on Age at Symptom Onset and Cognitive Decline in Individuals With Dominantly Inherited Alzheimer Disease.
items.abstract: Cognitive reserve has been shown to modulate the onset and progression of Alzheimer disease (AD) symptoms. Although its role in sporadic AD is well-studied, how cognitive reserve influences the timing and progression of symptoms in dominantly inherited AD (DIAD) remains unclear. This study aimed to quantify cognitive reserve in DIAD carriers and test whether higher cognitive reserve is associated with later symptom onset and slower functional decline. We analyzed data from the Dominantly Inherited Alzheimer's Network study. Cognitive reserve was modeled using a residual-based latent variable approach, decomposing cognitive performance into demographic (CogD), biomarker (CogB), and reserve or residual (CogR) components. Primary outcomes were age at clinical symptom onset (CDR >0) and longitudinal change in the Clinical Dementia Rating-Sum of Boxes (CDR-SBs). Data were analyzed using Cox proportional hazards models and linear mixed-effects models, adjusting for estimated years from onset (EYO). A total of 710 Dominantly Inherited Alzheimer Network (DIAN) participants were included in the analysis, comprising 271 non-DIAD carriers (nMC), 284 asymptomatic DIAD carriers (aMC), and 155 symptomatic DIAD carriers. In asymptomatic carriers, using a zero-inflation model adjusted for EYO showed that a 1 SD increase in the reserve component (CogR) was associated with a 4.06-fold increase in the odds of being clinically unimpaired (CDR-SB = 0; 95% CI 1.84-8.95). Similarly, a 1 SD increase in the demographic (CogD) and biomarker (CogB) components increased the odds of being CDR-SB = 0 by 2.60 (95% CI 1.10-6.16) and 5.16 (95% CI 2.00-13.33), respectively. Among symptomatic carriers, only the reserve and the biomarker components were significant. A 1 SD increase in CogR was associated with a 0.81-fold reduction in baseline CDR-SB score (95% CI 0.72-0.92), and a 1 SD increase in CogB was associated with a 0.60-fold reduction in CDR-SB (95% CI 0.50-0.71). Our findings indicate that higher cognitive reserve values are associated with delayed conversion to mild cognitive impairment and slower progression on clinical dementia rating scales. These findings suggest that cognitive reserve plays a protective role in modifying the clinical trajectory of genetically determined AD.
items.summary_ja:
背景：認知予備力（cognitive reserve）はアルツハイマー病（AD）の症状発現や進行に影響を与えることが知られているが、遺伝性AD（DIAD）におけるその役割は不明であった。  
方法：Dominantly Inherited Alzheimer's Network（DIAN）データを用い、認知機能を人口統計学的要因（CogD）、バイオマーカー（CogB）、予備力成分（CogR）に分解し、認知予備力の影響を解析。主要評価項目は症状発現年齢（CDR>0）と臨床認知症評価尺度（CDR-SB）の経時変化とした。  
結果：710名の参加者（非保因者271名、無症状保因者284名、症状保因者155名）を解析。無症状保因者では、CogRの1標準偏差増加が臨床的無症状状態（CDR-SB=0）のオッズを4.06倍に増加させた。CogDおよびCogBも有意に関連。症状保因者ではCogRとCogBが有意で、CogRの増加は基準時のCDR-SBスコアを低下させた。  
結論：認知予備力の高さは症状発現の遅延および認知機能低下の進行抑制に関連し、遺伝性ADの臨床経過を修飾する保護因子として重要であることが示された。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、遺伝性アルツハイマー病（DIAD）における認知予備力が症状発現年齢や認知機能低下に与える影響を検証した。710名のDIAD参加者を対象に、認知予備力を人口統計学的要因、バイオマーカー、残差成分に分解し解析。認知予備力の高い者は症状発現が遅れ、認知機能低下も緩やかであった。これにより、認知予備力が遺伝性ADの臨床経過を修飾する保護因子であることが示唆された。

items.title: Extent of Tau and Its Cognitive Implications in Patients With Cerebral Amyloid Angiopathy Without Cognitive Impairment.
items.abstract: Despite a well-established amyloid-tau neurodegeneration cascade in Alzheimer disease (AD), the extent and mechanistic relevance of tau pathology in cerebral amyloid angiopathy (CAA), a disease of vascular amyloid deposition, remain unclear. Focusing on patients with CAA without cognitive impairment to minimize concurrent AD pathology, we hypothesized that tau extent would be greater in patients with CAA than in healthy controls (HCs), largely attributable to amyloid burden, but it would not be associated with CAA-related imaging markers or cognitive scores in CAA. This cross-sectional study included patients with CAA and age-matched and sex-matched HCs, none of whom had cognitive impairment or dementia. All participants underwent brain MRI, Pittsburgh compound B (PiB)-PET for amyloid, and  The mean age of patients with CAA (n = 50) was 70.3 ± 7.6 years and of HCs was 69.7 ± 7.5 years ( Our results suggest that tau extent is mainly driven by age and vascular amyloid among patients with CAA and that tau extent is not related to CAA-related imaging markers or cognitive scores. These findings further support the view that tau does not affect CAA-specific disease mechanisms among patients with CAA without cognitive impairment.
items.summary_ja: 背景：アルツハイマー病（AD）ではアミロイドとタウの神経変性連鎖が知られているが、血管性アミロイド沈着を特徴とする脳アミロイド血管症（CAA）におけるタウ病理の範囲やその意義は不明である。方法：認知障害のないCAA患者（n=50）と年齢・性別を一致させた健常対照群（HC）を対象に、脳MRI、Pittsburgh化合物B（PiB）PETによるアミロイド評価を行い、タウの範囲と認知機能との関連を検討した。結果：CAA患者の平均年齢は70.3歳、HCは69.7歳であり、タウの範囲はCAA患者でHCより大きかったが、これは主に年齢と血管性アミロイド負荷によるものであった。一方、タウの範囲はCAA特有の画像マーカーや認知機能スコアとは関連しなかった。結論：認知障害のないCAA患者において、タウの広がりは主に年齢と血管性アミロイドに依存し、CAA特有の病態や認知機能には影響しないことが示された。これは、タウがCAAの病態メカニズムに直接関与しないことを支持する知見である。
items.summary_short_ja: 認知障害のない脳アミロイド血管症（CAA）患者と健常者を比較した結果、CAA患者のタウ蛋白蓄積は主に加齢と血管性アミロイド負荷によって増加するが、CAA特有の画像マーカーや認知機能とは関連しなかった。これは、認知障害のないCAA患者においてタウ病理がCAAの病態進行に直接関与しないことを示唆している。

items.title: Differences in Survival Associated With the First Antiseizure Medication in People With Dementia and Epilepsy.
items.abstract: Epilepsy is an increasingly recognized comorbidity in neurocognitive disorders. Although experts recommend newer antiseizure medications (ASMs), whether there are real-world benefits of selecting particular ASMs for epilepsy in dementia remains unknown. Our objective was to examine whether different ASMs are associated with differences in survival in persons with epilepsy and dementia. A cohort study was conducted using Swedish national registers. We included individuals with dementia who received ASM treatment after a diagnosis of epilepsy after January 1, 2006. Data were analyzed until December 2023. Dispensed ASMs (Anatomical Therapeutic Code N03) were used to identify treatment; patients were categorized as starting one of the 4 most common ASMs (carbamazepine, levetiracetam, lamotrigine, valproate) or other ASMs. Recurrent prescriptions were used to determine treatment duration. Associations between all-cause death and ASMs were assessed by Cox proportional hazards regression. We also assessed causes of death and the risk of cardiovascular death. In Sweden, between 2006 and 2023, we included 5,764 individuals (2,811 men [48.8%] and 2,953 women [51.2%]) using their first ASM after a diagnosis of epilepsy and dementia. Carbamazepine (n = 1,578) was the most common ASM before 2015 and levetiracetam (n = 2098) most common thereafter. In Kaplan-Meier analyses and Cox regression models adjusting for age, sex, year of ASM start, and comorbidities, valproate (n = 746) was associated with increased adjusted hazard ratio (aHR) of death (1.34, 95% CI 1.20-1.48), in contrast to lamotrigine (n = 922, aHR: 0.84, 95% CI 0.75-0.93) and levetiracetam (n = 2098, aHR: 0.93, 95% CI 0.85-1.03). The risks were similar in analyses using restricted mean survival time, propensity score-matched sets of participants, balancing weights in regression models, and cases with epilepsy onset in existing dementia. Cardiovascular causes of death were more common among users of valproate or carbamazepine than among users of lamotrigine and levetiracetam. Compared with carbamazepine, valproate was associated with increased risk of cardiovascular death (aHR: 1.30; 95% CI 1.11-1.52) while lamotrigine (aHR 0.79; 95% CI 0.66-0.94) was associated with a reduced risk. In this population-wide cohort study, use of valproate was associated with the highest risk of death in persons with epilepsy and dementia. Lamotrigine and, in some models, levetiracetam were associated with better survival than both valproate and carbamazepine. This provides real-world support for existing expert guidelines.
items.summary_ja:
背景：認知症患者におけるてんかんは重要な併存症であり、新しい抗てんかん薬（ASM）の使用が推奨されているが、実際の生存率への影響は不明であった。  
方法：スウェーデンの全国登録データを用い、2006年以降にてんかんと診断されASM治療を開始した認知症患者5,764人を対象に、カルバマゼピン、レベチラセタム、ラモトリギン、バルプロ酸の4種類のASMとその他のASMの使用と生存率の関連をコックス回帰モデルで解析した。年齢、性別、併存疾患などを調整し、死亡原因や心血管死のリスクも評価した。  
結果：バルプロ酸使用者は死亡リスクが最も高く（調整ハザード比1.34）、ラモトリギン（0.84）およびレベチラセタム（0.93）使用者はより良好な生存率を示した。心血管死はバルプロ酸およびカルバマゼピン使用者で多く、ラモトリギン使用者はリスクが低かった。  
結論：認知症とてんかんを有する患者において、バルプロ酸の使用は死亡リスクを増加させる一方、ラモトリギンやレベチラセタムは生存率改善に寄与する可能性があり、専門家のガイドラインを支持する実証的証拠を提供した。
items.summary_short_ja: 認知症とてんかんを併発する患者5,764名を対象に、最初に使用した抗てんかん薬（ASM）と生存率の関連を調査した。結果、バルプロ酸は死亡リスクを有意に増加させ（aHR 1.34）、心血管死のリスクも高かった。一方、ラモトリギンは死亡リスクを低減（aHR 0.84）し、レベチラセタムも生存率改善傾向を示した。これらは専門家の推奨を支持する実世界データである。

items.title: Characterizing Individuals Fulfilling Clinical Criteria for Limbic-Predominant Age-Related TDP-43 Encephalopathy in a Tertiary Memory Clinic.
items.abstract: Limbic-predominant age-related TDP-43 encephalopathy (LATE) is characterized by an amnestic- and limbic-predominant phenotype, which can mimic Alzheimer disease (AD). In a memory clinic cohort, we tested whether clinical criteria for LATE can detect a clinical profile of LATE that is distinct from AD. In this retrospective examination of a longitudinal memory clinic cohort from the Alzheimer Center Amsterdam, we included individuals with mild cognitive impairment (MCI) and dementia (aged >50 years). We classified individuals based on baseline data on cognition, atrophy, amyloid-status, and tau-status into Probable- and Possible-LATE, co-occurring LATE and AD (LATE-AD), and AD (without LATE). Next, we compared these groups on demographics, clinical features, cognition, and atrophy. Of 3,606 individuals (mean age at baseline 66 [SD 6], 49.2% female) available for classification, we classified 56 (1.6%) as Probable-LATE, 115 (3.2%) as Possible-LATE, 127 (3.5%) as LATE-AD, and 1,675 (46.5%) as AD. Individuals with Probable-LATE progressed slower than AD on mini-mental state examination (MMSE) (sβ [SE] = 0.12 [0.05],  Using an operationalization of clinical criteria for LATE, 8.2% of participants with MCI or dementia from our tertiary memory clinic were classified as Possible-LATE, Probable-LATE, or LATE-AD. Probable-LATE was characterized by a milder disease course than AD, whereas LATE-AD was characterized by a more aggressive disease course. This underscores the value of the proposed clinical criteria in identifying individuals with suspected LATE, who have distinct clinical trajectories from AD. Our findings, therefore, support the use of these criteria to improve diagnostic and prognostic accuracy in the memory clinic.
items.summary_ja:
背景：Limbic-predominant age-related TDP-43 encephalopathy（LATE）は、記憶障害を主としアルツハイマー病（AD）と類似した臨床像を示す疾患であるが、両者の鑑別は困難である。  
方法：アルツハイマーセンター・アムステルダムの記憶クリニックに通院する50歳以上の軽度認知障害（MCI）および認知症患者3,606名を対象に、認知機能、萎縮、アミロイドおよびタウの状態に基づき、Probable-LATE、Possible-LATE、LATE-AD（LATEとADの併存）、AD（LATEなし）に分類した。各群の人口統計学的特徴、臨床症状、認知機能、萎縮の違いを比較した。  
結果：対象者のうち、1.6%がProbable-LATE、3.2%がPossible-LATE、3.5%がLATE-AD、46.5%がADに分類された。Probable-LATE群はAD群に比べて認知機能低下の進行が緩徐であったのに対し、LATE-AD群はより進行が速かった。  
結論：臨床基準を用いることで、LATEを疑う患者を識別可能であり、ADとは異なる臨床経過を示すことが明らかとなった。これにより、記憶クリニックにおける診断・予後予測の精度向上が期待される。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、三次記憶クリニックの認知障害患者を対象に、LATE（辺縁優位加齢性TDP-43脳症）の臨床基準を用いてAD（アルツハイマー病）と異なる臨床像を検証した。3606名中8.2%がLATE関連群に分類され、Probable-LATEはADより進行が緩やかで、LATE-ADはより進行が速いことが示された。これにより、LATEの臨床基準は診断・予後評価の精度向上に有用であることが示唆された。

items.title: Cognitive and Brain Reserve as Modifiers of Early Alzheimer Disease-Related Cognitive Vulnerability.
items.abstract: Maintaining cognitive function despite the presence of Alzheimer disease (AD) pathology is the foundation of cognitive reserve. Although the theory of cognitive reserve is strongly supported by empirical research, the field lacks standardized, validated methods for quantifying cognitive and brain reserve. We tested whether associations between AD pathology and cognitive function were modified by proxy measures of cognitive reserve (years of education, socioeconomic status; SES) and brain reserve (brain-predicted age difference, and a volumetric AD signature). We hypothesized that greater structural brain integrity, higher education, and higher SES would attenuate the association between greater AD pathology and poorer cognitive performance. This cross-sectional study analyzed baseline data from a multisite randomized clinical trial, which was conducted at 3 US universities and enrolled cognitively unimpaired, physically inactive, community-dwelling adults. AD pathology was measured via plasma assays for phosphorylated tau (p-tau)-217 in the whole cohort, and PET for β-amyloid (Aβ) in a subset of participants as a secondary analysis. The primary outcome of cognitive function was evaluated by a comprehensive cognitive assessment. SES was measured via the MacArthur Socioeconomic Status Index, and magnetic resonance imaging was used to calculate brain-predicted age difference (brain-PAD) and a volumetric AD signature. Data were analyzed using linear regression models with interaction terms for moderation analyses. A total of 621 participants (aged 69.9 ± 3.8, 71% female) had available data for the main analyses and 355 had PET Centiloid data available. Brain-PAD moderated the association between AD pathology (measured by p-tau217) and multiple cognitive domains, including episodic memory (β = -0.09 [-0.16 to -0.02]), processing speed (β = -0.08 [-0.15 to -0.01]), working memory (β = -0.10 [-0.18 to -0.03]), and executive function/attentional control (β = -0.08 [-0.15 to -0.01]). Specifically, the negative association of greater AD pathology with poorer cognition was weakest in individuals with younger appearing brains. A latent SES score also moderated the relationship between p-tau217 and episodic memory (β = 0.08 [0.01-0.16]), but this did not survive correction for multiple comparisons. Neither years of education nor the volumetric AD signature moderated pathology-cognition associations. These results support the hypothesis that higher cognitive and brain reserve may help buffer the cognitive consequences of AD pathology. Strategies to increase both cognitive and brain reserve could help to boost resilience against emerging AD pathology; however, longitudinal studies are needed to confirm these conclusions.
items.summary_ja:
背景：アルツハイマー病（AD）病理があっても認知機能を維持する認知予備力の理論は支持されているが、認知予備力や脳予備力を定量化する標準的手法は不足している。  
方法：認知予備力の代理指標（教育年数、社会経済的地位：SES）と脳予備力（脳予測年齢差、AD特異的体積指標）がAD病理と認知機能の関連を修飾するかを検証した。対象は認知障害のない高齢者621名で、血漿中のリン酸化タウ217（p-tau217）や一部でPETによるβアミロイド測定を行い、包括的認知評価を実施。線形回帰モデルで相互作用を分析した。  
結果：脳予測年齢差（brain-PAD）はp-tau217と複数の認知領域（エピソード記憶、処理速度、作業記憶、実行機能）間の負の関連を緩和し、若い脳を持つ人ほどAD病理の認知影響が小さかった。SESもエピソード記憶に対する修飾効果を示したが、多重比較補正後は有意でなかった。教育年数や体積的AD指標は修飾効果を示さなかった。  
結論：高い認知予備力および脳予備力はAD病理による認知機能低下を緩和する可能性があり、これらを高める戦略はADに対する認知的レジリエンス向上に有望である。ただし、因果関係解明には縦断研究が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、アルツハイマー病（AD）病理と認知機能の関連に対し、認知予備力（教育年数、社会経済的地位）および脳予備力（脳の予測年齢差、体積的AD指標）が修飾因子となるかを検証した。結果、脳の若々しさを示す指標がAD病理と認知低下の関連を緩和し、社会経済的地位も一部で影響を示したが、教育年数や体積的指標は影響しなかった。これらは認知・脳予備力がAD病理の認知影響を緩和する可能性を示唆し、予備力向上がAD耐性強化に寄与する可能性がある。

items.title: Association of an Aquaporin-4 Haplotype With Cognition, Brain Volume, and Dementia Risk in Community-Dwelling Individuals Without Dementia.
items.abstract: The aquaporin-4 (AQP4) water channel plays an integral role in clearing brain waste. However, little is known about whether variations in the  This study included participants from 2 prospective cohort studies. First, participants from the original, offspring, new offspring spouse, and generation 3 cohorts from the Framingham Heart Study (FHS; enrolled 1948-2005) were included with dementia follow-up until 2022. Original FHS participants were from Framingham, Massachusetts at the time of enrollment. Analyses were replicated for brain MRI outcomes and incident dementia with UK Biobank participants (enrolled 2006-2010) who were followed until 2022. All participants were dementia-free at the time of cognitive assessment, brain MRI, and commencement of dementia follow-up. Linear regression models were conducted to analyze the associations between  The FHS sample comprised 3,847 participants (65% homozygote major, 31% heterozygote, 4% homozygote minor) with cognitive testing (mean age 61 ± 11 years; 54% women); 3,332 had brain MRI. Heterozygotes displayed better verbal episodic memory (β = 0.32, 95% CI 0.09-0.55,  Carrying at least 1 minor allele at an
items.summary_ja:
背景：アクアポリン-4（AQP4）は脳内の老廃物除去に重要な水チャネルであるが、その遺伝的多型が認知機能や脳容積、認知症リスクに与える影響は不明である。  
方法：フラミンガム心臓研究（FHS）とUKバイオバンクの認知症非罹患者を対象に、AQP4ハプロタイプと認知機能、脳MRI所見、認知症発症リスクの関連を検討した。FHSでは3,847名（平均年齢61歳、54%女性）、うち3,332名が脳MRIを実施。線形回帰モデルを用いて解析を行い、UKバイオバンクで結果の再現性を確認した。  
結果：FHSではヘテロ接合型が言語性エピソード記憶で優れた成績を示し（β=0.32、95%CI 0.09-0.55）、脳容積も有意に大きかった。UKバイオバンクでも同様の傾向が認められた。さらに、少なくとも1つのマイナーアレルを保有する群で認知症発症リスクが低減した。  
結論：AQP4の特定ハプロタイプは認知機能の維持や脳容積の保持、認知症リスクの低減に関連しており、脳の老廃物除去機構が認知症予防に寄与する可能性が示唆された。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、アクアポリン-4（AQP4）遺伝子ハプロタイプと認知機能、脳容積、認知症リスクの関連を、認知症未発症の地域在住者を対象に検討した。フラミンガム心臓研究およびUKバイオバンクのデータを用い、AQP4の遺伝的多型が言語性エピソード記憶の向上や脳容積の維持と関連し、認知症発症リスクの低減に寄与する可能性を示した。

items.title: Plant-Based Dietary Patterns and Risk of Alzheimer Disease and Related Dementias in the Multiethnic Cohort Study.
items.abstract: Plant-based diets have been linked to slower cognitive decline, but data on long-term dietary changes and from diverse populations are limited. The primary aim of this study was to examine plant-based dietary patterns and their change over time in relation to Alzheimer disease and related dementias (ADRDs). This prospective longitudinal analysis of the Multiethnic Cohort Study, based in Hawaii and California (primarily Los Angeles County), included data on African American, Japanese American, Latino, Native Hawaiian, and White participants who completed food frequency questionnaires at baseline (1993-1996; age 45-75 years) and at 10-year follow-up (2003-2008) and whose Medicare claims were linked to identify incident ADRDs. A priori indices for the overall plant-based diet index (PDI), the healthful plant-based diet index (hPDI), and the unhealthful plant-based diet index (uPDI) were analyzed in Cox regression models for ADRD. The analysis included 92,849 participants (mean age 59.2 years, 55.1% female, 21,478 with ADRDs) for the baseline diet and 45,065 participants (8,360 with ADRDs) for the 10-year dietary change. For the baseline diet, comparing the highest vs lowest quintile, PDI and hPDI were associated with 12% (hazard ratio [HR] 0.88; 95% CI 0.85-0.92) and 7% (HR 0.93; 95% CI 0.89-0.97) lower risks of ADRD, respectively, whereas uPDI was related to a 6% higher risk (HR 1.06; 95% CI 1.01-1.10). For the dietary change over time, the strongest association with ADRD was observed for uPDI rather than for PDI or hPDI. Compared with those with a stable score (<0.5 SD change), participants with a large increase in uPDI (≥1 SD) showed a 25% higher risk (HR 1.25; 95% CI 1.15-1.36) and those with a large decrease in uPDI showed an 11% lower risk (HR 0.89; 95% CI 0.84-0.94). The associations between the plant-based diet indices and ADRD were generally similar by age group (<60 vs ≥60 years at baseline), race and ethnicity, or  These findings suggest that adopting plant-based diets, specifically refraining from low-quality plant-based diets, even at an older age, is associated with a lower risk of ADRDs.
items.summary_ja:
背景：植物由来の食事パターンは認知機能の低下抑制と関連が示唆されているが、多様な人種集団における長期的な食事変化と認知症リスクの関連は不明である。  
方法：ハワイとカリフォルニアを拠点とする多民族コホート研究において、アフリカ系アメリカ人、日本人アメリカ人、ラテン系、ネイティブハワイアン、白人の92,849名（平均年齢59.2歳）が1993-1996年と10年後の2003-2008年に食事頻度調査を実施。メディケア請求データと連結し、アルツハイマー病および関連認知症（ADRD）の発症を追跡。植物ベースの食事指数（PDI）、健康的植物ベース食指数（hPDI）、非健康的植物ベース食指数（uPDI）を用いてCox回帰分析を行った。  
結果：ベースラインでPDIとhPDIの高い群はADRDリスクがそれぞれ12％、7％低く、uPDIの高い群は6％リスクが高かった。10年間の食事変化では、uPDIの増加が25％リスク上昇、減少が11％リスク低下と最も強い関連を示した。年齢、人種、民族別でも類似の傾向が認められた。  
結論：特に質の低い植物ベース食を避けることは、高齢期でもADRDリスク低減に寄与する可能性がある。
items.summary_short_ja: 多民族コホート研究において、植物性食品中心の食事パターンとアルツハイマー病・関連認知症（ADRD）のリスクを調査した。健康的な植物ベースの食事（hPDI）はADRDリスクを7～12％低減し、不健康な植物ベースの食事（uPDI）はリスクを6～25％増加させた。特にuPDIの増減がリスクに強く影響し、年齢や人種を問わず同様の傾向が認められた。質の高い植物性食の継続的な摂取がADRD予防に有効と示唆される。

items.title: Effect of Cognitive Reserve on Age at Symptom Onset and Cognitive Decline in Individuals With Dominantly Inherited Alzheimer Disease.
items.abstract: Cognitive reserve has been shown to modulate the onset and progression of Alzheimer disease (AD) symptoms. Although its role in sporadic AD is well-studied, how cognitive reserve influences the timing and progression of symptoms in dominantly inherited AD (DIAD) remains unclear. This study aimed to quantify cognitive reserve in DIAD carriers and test whether higher cognitive reserve is associated with later symptom onset and slower functional decline. We analyzed data from the Dominantly Inherited Alzheimer's Network study. Cognitive reserve was modeled using a residual-based latent variable approach, decomposing cognitive performance into demographic (CogD), biomarker (CogB), and reserve or residual (CogR) components. Primary outcomes were age at clinical symptom onset (CDR >0) and longitudinal change in the Clinical Dementia Rating-Sum of Boxes (CDR-SBs). Data were analyzed using Cox proportional hazards models and linear mixed-effects models, adjusting for estimated years from onset (EYO). A total of 710 Dominantly Inherited Alzheimer Network (DIAN) participants were included in the analysis, comprising 271 non-DIAD carriers (nMC), 284 asymptomatic DIAD carriers (aMC), and 155 symptomatic DIAD carriers. In asymptomatic carriers, using a zero-inflation model adjusted for EYO showed that a 1 SD increase in the reserve component (CogR) was associated with a 4.06-fold increase in the odds of being clinically unimpaired (CDR-SB = 0; 95% CI 1.84-8.95). Similarly, a 1 SD increase in the demographic (CogD) and biomarker (CogB) components increased the odds of being CDR-SB = 0 by 2.60 (95% CI 1.10-6.16) and 5.16 (95% CI 2.00-13.33), respectively. Among symptomatic carriers, only the reserve and the biomarker components were significant. A 1 SD increase in CogR was associated with a 0.81-fold reduction in baseline CDR-SB score (95% CI 0.72-0.92), and a 1 SD increase in CogB was associated with a 0.60-fold reduction in CDR-SB (95% CI 0.50-0.71). Our findings indicate that higher cognitive reserve values are associated with delayed conversion to mild cognitive impairment and slower progression on clinical dementia rating scales. These findings suggest that cognitive reserve plays a protective role in modifying the clinical trajectory of genetically determined AD.
items.summary_ja:
背景：認知予備力（cognitive reserve）はアルツハイマー病（AD）の症状発現や進行に影響を与えることが知られているが、遺伝性AD（DIAD）におけるその役割は不明であった。  
方法：Dominantly Inherited Alzheimer's Network（DIAN）研究のデータ710例（非保因者271例、無症状保因者284例、症候性保因者155例）を用い、認知機能を人口統計学的要因（CogD）、バイオマーカー（CogB）、予備力成分（CogR）に分解。症状発現年齢と臨床認知症評価尺度（CDR-SB）の経時変化をCox比例ハザードモデルおよび線形混合効果モデルで解析した。  
結果：無症状保因者では、CogRの1標準偏差増加が臨床的無症状状態（CDR-SB=0）である確率を4.06倍に増加させた。CogDおよびCogBもそれぞれ2.60倍、5.16倍の増加を示した。症候性保因者ではCogRとCogBが有意で、CogRの増加はCDR-SBスコアの低下（0.81倍）、CogBの増加はさらに顕著な低下（0.60倍）と関連した。  
結論：認知予備力の高さは遺伝性ADにおける症状発現の遅延および認知機能低下の進行抑制に寄与し、遺伝的に決定されたADの臨床経過を修飾する保護因子として重要であることが示された。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、優性遺伝性アルツハイマー病（DIAD）における認知予備力（cognitive reserve）が症状発現年齢や認知機能低下に与える影響を検証した。710名のDIAD関連者を対象に、認知予備力を人口統計学的要因、バイオマーカー、残差成分に分解し解析。認知予備力が高いほど症状発現が遅れ、臨床的認知機能低下の進行も緩やかであることが示された。認知予備力は遺伝性ADの臨床経過修飾に保護的役割を果たすと結論づけられる。

items.title: Risk of Alzheimer Dementia After High-Dose vs Standard-Dose Influenza Vaccination.
items.abstract: Previous studies, including large cohort analyses comparing vaccinated and unvaccinated adults, suggest that routine immunizations such as inactivated influenza vaccines (IIVs) may reduce Alzheimer dementia (AD) risk. Whether AD risk differs after high-dose IIV (H-IIV) vs standard-dose IIV (S-IIV) remains unexamined. We hypothesized that AD risk would be lower among adults ≥65 years after H-IIV compared with S-IIV. This retrospective cohort study analyzed data spanning 2014-2019 from IQVIA PharMetrics Plus for Academics, a US health care claims database. Eligible participants were ≥65 years with ≥2 years of continuous medical and pharmaceutical coverage and no previous diagnostic or pharmacotherapeutic indicators of cognitive impairment. Vaccinations were identified by name and Current Procedural Terminology codes. Participants were followed for up to 3 years postvaccination. Incident AD was defined using International Classification of Diseases codes and AD medication dispenses (anticholinesterase inhibitors, memantine). We emulated a target trial using sequential nested trials to align eligibility, treatment assignment, and time-zero with vaccination dates, preventing immortal time bias. Inverse probability weighting adjusted for measured confounding, emulated randomization, and mitigated selection bias. Effects were estimated as risk difference, number needed to treat (NNT), risk ratio; 95% CIs were obtained via bootstrapping. Secondary analyses examined potential effect modifiers such as sex. The H-IIV group included 120,775 unique participants (185,183 person-trials; mean age 74.4 years, SD 5.5; 57.3% female), and the S-IIV group included 44,022 participants (53,918 person-trials; mean age 73.0, SD 6.1; 56.4% female). H-IIV was associated with significantly lower AD risk during months 1-25 postvaccination (minimum NNT = 185.2 at 25 months). After sex stratification, risk reduction persisted longer among women (months 1-13, minimum NNT = 416.7) than men (months 17-24, significant only in intention-to-treat analysis, minimum NNT = 232.6). High-dose influenza vaccination is associated with reduced AD risk compared with standard-dose vaccination in adults ≥65 years, with a stronger effect among women. Significant study limitations included duration of follow-up (≤3 years) and lack of sociodemographic, lifestyle, biomarker, and mortality data. Further research is needed to clarify whether the observed difference reflects protection against influenza infection or non-infection-related mechanisms. This study provides Class II evidence that treatment with H-IIV vs S-IIV was associated with decreased incident dementia in individuals ≥65 years of age captured in this US health care claims database.
items.summary_ja:
背景：従来の研究では、不活化インフルエンザワクチン（IIV）がアルツハイマー型認知症（AD）リスクを低減する可能性が示唆されているが、高用量（H-IIV）と標準用量（S-IIV）でのリスク差は未検証であった。  
方法：2014～2019年の米国医療請求データベースを用い、65歳以上で認知機能障害の既往がない参加者を対象に後ろ向きコホート研究を実施。H-IIV群（12万名超）とS-IIV群（4万名超）に分け、最大3年間追跡。AD発症は診断コードと薬剤投与情報で判定。交絡因子調整に逆確率重み付けを用い、性別による効果修飾も検討した。  
結果：H-IIV接種者は接種後1～25か月間にわたりADリスクが有意に低下（最小NNT=185.2）。性別解析では女性で効果がより長期間持続（1～13か月、最小NNT=416.7）、男性では17～24か月に限定的に認められた。  
結論：65歳以上の高齢者において、高用量インフルエンザワクチン接種は標準用量と比較しAD発症リスクを低減し、特に女性で効果が強いことが示された。ただし、追跡期間の短さや生活習慣情報欠如などの制約があり、今後は感染防御以外のメカニズムの解明が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 65歳以上の高齢者を対象に、高用量インフルエンザワクチン（H-IIV）と標準用量ワクチン（S-IIV）接種後のアルツハイマー型認知症（AD）発症リスクを比較した後ろ向きコホート研究。H-IIV接種群はS-IIV群に比べ、接種後1～25か月間にわたりADリスクが有意に低下し、特に女性で効果が強かった。追跡期間は最大3年で、社会経済的要因などの調整は不十分。さらなる検証が必要とされるが、高用量ワクチン接種はAD予防に有望な可能性を示した。

items.title: Low Sensitivity of Neuropsychological Scales Hinder Detection of Potential Benefit of Treatments in Alzheimer's Disease: A Position Paper.
items.abstract: Despite the advent of Disease Modifying Therapies (DMTs) for Alzheimer's Disease (AD), the approval and commercialization of anti-amyloid monoclonal antibodies has been slow and contentious, particularly in Europe. The primary source of debate is the discrepancy between robust biological effects-namely, effective β-amyloid clearance-and modest clinical improvements, which, although statistically significant, often fail to reach the minimal clinically important difference (MCID) compared to placebo. This paper highlights a confounding factor in the interpretation of the results of clinical trials: limited sensitivity of neuropsychological outcome measures. These tools, developed in the 1980s and only marginally updated, are not suited to detect subtle but meaningful cognitive changes in early disease stages. The ADAS-Cog, the most commonly used cognitive endpoint, suffers from a substantial ceiling effect, impairing its ability to capture cognitive decline over short durations in prodromal populations. Likewise, functional scales such as the CDR-SB are inherently insensitive in mild cognitive impairment (MCI), as functional independence is, by definition, preserved. Moreover, the use of composite multidomain scales with high baseline scores may mask domain-specific improvements, further limiting a drug's capacity to reach MCID thresholds. Methodological limitations risk undervaluing the therapeutic impact of treatment, particularly in trials targeting early or preclinical phases where changes are subtle and domain-specific. Urgent reconsideration of outcome measures is necessary to ensure accurate assessment of clinical efficacy and to avoid prematurely discarding potentially beneficial therapies.
items.summary_ja:
背景：アルツハイマー病（AD）に対する疾患修飾療法（DMT）の登場にもかかわらず、抗アミロイドモノクローナル抗体の承認・普及は欧州を中心に遅れている。主な論争点は、生物学的効果（βアミロイドの効果的除去）と臨床的改善の乖離にある。  
方法：本論文は、臨床試験結果の解釈を困難にしている要因として、神経心理学的評価尺度の感度の低さに着目。1980年代に開発され、ほとんど更新されていない評価ツールの限界を検証した。  
結果：最も一般的な認知機能評価尺度ADAS-Cogは天井効果が強く、前駆期の認知低下を短期間で捉えにくい。機能評価尺度CDR-SBも軽度認知障害（MCI）では感度が低く、複合多領域尺度は基準値が高いため、特定領域の改善を見逃しやすい。  
結論：評価尺度の感度不足により、特に早期・前臨床段階の治療効果が過小評価されるリスクがある。臨床効果の正確な評価と有望な治療の早期廃棄防止のため、評価方法の見直しが急務である。
items.summary_short_ja: アルツハイマー病治療薬の臨床試験で、神経心理学的評価尺度の感度不足が治療効果検出を妨げている。特にADAS-CogやCDR-SBは初期段階の微細な認知変化や機能低下を捉えにくく、統計的有意差があっても臨床的意義を示しにくい。これにより、早期や前臨床期を対象とした治療の真の効果が過小評価される恐れがあり、評価尺度の見直しが急務である。

items.title: Subjective Memory Impairment in the General Adult Population: Associations With Early-Life Cognition, Concurrent Objective Memory, Dementia Risk Factors.
items.abstract: Subjective memory impairment (SMI) is used as a proxy for objective memory, although their relationship remains unclear. Moreover, SMI is suggested to be a risk factor for dementia. This study investigated associations between SMI and (1) concurrent objective memory performance, (2) early-life general cognitive abilities (GCA), and (3) if SMI and objective memory scores were associated with distinct or overlapping sociodemographic, health, and lifestyle risk factors for dementia. 2690 participants between 30 and 90 years from the general, geographical population study HUNT4 were included. SMI scores were from the Meta-Memory-Questionnaire. Verbal, spatial, and ability to differentiate between similar representations (pattern separation) were tested concurrently. GCA was from conscription at age 18. We implemented multiple imputation and inverse probability weighting from the entire population to account for selection bias. Higher SMI scores were associated with verbal memory and GCA, but not spatial or pattern separation memory. There was an interaction between sex and verbal memory on SMI, with men reporting higher SMI than women at similar lower verbal memory performance. Higher SMI scores were associated with higher age, blood pressure, depression, sleep, fatigue, and chronic pain, but not APOE4 or lifestyle variables. All memory tests were positively associated with each other and negatively with age. Diabetes was associated with verbal memory. In the general population, SMI was weakly linked to concurrent verbal memory and GCA in adolescence. Health, in particular mental health, was highly associated with SMI but not objective memory performance. Thus, SMI is a complement to memory testing, not a proxy.
items.summary_ja:
背景：主観的記憶障害（SMI）は客観的記憶の代替指標として用いられるが、その関連性は不明瞭であり、認知症リスク因子とも示唆されている。  
方法：30～90歳の一般成人2690名を対象に、SMI（Meta-Memory-Questionnaire）、言語的・空間的記憶および類似表象識別能力（パターンセパレーション）を同時に評価。18歳時の一般認知能力（GCA）データも用い、多重代入法と逆確率重み付けで選択バイアスを調整した。  
結果：SMIは言語的記憶およびGCAと関連したが、空間的記憶やパターンセパレーションとは関連せず、性別と相互作用が認められ、同程度の言語記憶低下でも男性の方がSMIが高かった。SMIは高齢、血圧、うつ、睡眠障害、疲労、慢性痛と関連したが、APOE4や生活習慣とは関連しなかった。全ての記憶テストは互いに正の相関を示し、年齢とは負の相関があった。糖尿病は言語記憶と関連。  
結論：一般集団においてSMIは言語的記憶および青年期のGCAと弱く関連し、主に精神的健康状態と強く関連するため、SMIは客観的記憶検査の代替ではなく補完的指標である。
items.summary_short_ja: 主観的記憶障害（SMI）は客観的記憶の代替指標として用いられるが、その関連性は不明確である。本研究は一般成人2690名を対象に、SMIと同時期の客観的記憶、青年期の認知能力、認知症リスク因子との関連を検討した。SMIは言語記憶および青年期の認知能力と弱く関連し、性別や精神健康状態（うつ、疲労、慢性痛）とも関連したが、空間記憶や生活習慣とは関連しなかった。SMIは記憶検査の補完指標であり、単なる代替指標ではないことが示された。

items.title: Neuroimaging Biomarkers of Disease Progression and Cognitive Change in Patients With Retinal Vasculopathy With Cerebral Leukoencephalopathy.
items.abstract: A monogenic, age-related cerebral small vessel disease (cSVD), retinal vasculopathy with cerebral leukoencephalopathy and systemic manifestations (RVCL-S), causes accelerated vascular dementia, vision loss, and premature death. Given knowledge is limited regarding its pathophysiology, we examined the natural history of progression in imaging and cognitive endpoints to define the rate and variability of progression in a prospective RVCL-S cohort. We hypothesized that cerebral blood flow (CBF) and oxygen extraction fraction (OEF), as metrics of cerebral hypoxia-ischemia, would be associated with neurologic disease progression. We performed sequential brain MRI and a cognitive battery in a prospective RVCL-S cohort. Arterial spin labeling and asymmetric spin echo quantified CBF and OEF in normal-appearing white matter (WM), respectively. Three neuroimaging endpoints of cSVD included the following: log-transformed, normalized fluid-attenuated inversion recovery WM hyperintensity (WMH) volume; WM microstructure using mean diffusivity; and normalized WM volume. Five cognitive and motor endpoints included Digit Symbol Substitution Test (DSST), category fluency, free recall, Montreal Cognitive Assessment (MoCA), and gait speed. Linear mixed-effects models examined age, CBF, and OEF in association with neuroimaging and cognitive progression. Twenty-five participants, aged 23-68 years (median 47 years, 56% female), underwent 151 scans over a median (25th, 75th) of 2.2 (1.8, 4.4) years. All neuroimaging and cognitive endpoints progressed over time, except for MoCA. Of neuroimaging endpoints, WMH volume demonstrated the largest rate of change (+31.3%/year, 95% CI 20.8%-42.3%). Of cognitive endpoints, DSST, a metric of processing speed, showed the steepest decline (-13.1 T-score points/decade, 95% CI -21.2 to -5.32), followed by free recall and category fluency (-5 [-7.9 to -2.4] and -4.1 [-7.2 to -1.2] T-score points per decade, respectively). The age at first brain lesion was estimated to be 30.6 (23.8, 35.8) years, modeled from individual WMH volume trajectories. In multivariable analysis, OEF, but not CBF, was independently associated with WMH growth (β = 3.73, 95% CI 0.63-6.83,  Elevated OEF in at-risk WM was associated with progression in WMH and impairment in WM microstructure, suggesting a role for tissue hypoxia-ischemia in underlying RVCL-S pathophysiology. Cerebral OEF holds promise as a predictive biomarker to risk-stratify patients with RVCL-S and other forms of cSVD.
items.summary_ja:
背景：RVCL-Sは単一遺伝子による加齢関連の脳小血管病（cSVD）で、血管性認知症や視力障害、早期死亡を引き起こすが、その病態生理は不明な点が多い。  
方法：前向きコホートのRVCL-S患者25名（23～68歳）を対象に、脳MRIと認知機能検査を複数回実施。動脈スピンラベリングと非対称スピンエコー法で脳血流（CBF）と酸素抽出率（OEF）を測定し、白質病変量（WMH）、白質微細構造、白質体積の3つの画像指標と、5つの認知・運動指標の進行を線形混合モデルで解析した。  
結果：全指標は経時的に悪化し、特にWMH量は年率31.3%増加、認知機能では処理速度を示すDSSTが最も急激に低下した。初回脳病変発症年齢は約30歳と推定。多変量解析でOEFはWMH増加と独立して関連し、CBFは関連しなかった。  
結論：リスクのある白質領域でのOEF上昇は組織の低酸素虚血を反映し、RVCL-Sの病態進行に関与する可能性が高い。脳のOEFはRVCL-Sや他のcSVD患者のリスク層別化に有用なバイオマーカーとなり得る。
items.summary_short_ja: RVCL-Sは単一遺伝子による加齢性脳小血管病で、血管性認知症や視力低下を引き起こす。本研究は前向きコホートで脳MRIと認知機能検査を用い、病態進行を評価した。白質病変量は年率31.3%増加し、認知機能では処理速度が最も著しく低下した。酸素抽出率（OEF）が白質病変の進行と関連し、組織の低酸素虚血が病態に関与することを示唆。OEFはRVCL-Sや他の脳小血管病の進行予測バイオマーカーとして有望である。

items.title: Type 1 Diabetes and Incident Dementia: An Analysis in the All of Us Cohort.
items.abstract: Although diabetes mellitus (DM) is a well-established determinant of dementia risk, most studies have evaluated type 2 DM (T2DM) or any DM. The influence of type 1 DM (T1DM) on dementia risk remains unclear. We evaluated associations of T1DM and T2DM, separately, with incident dementia using linked electronic health records (EHRs). This prospective cohort study used previously collected survey and EHR data from the All of Us (AoU) cohort, a convenience sample of US adults. Eligible participants were 50 years or older and completed baseline surveys. Enrollment began in 2017, with data available through October 2023, along with records before enrollment. Mean follow-up from baseline was 2.4 years. We developed an algorithm to distinguish DM type based on count of T1DM encounters. This algorithm was validated against 2 reference measures: self-reported diabetes type and C-peptide values. Using AoU data, we classified participants as having no DM, T1DM, or T2DM. We ascertained incident dementia using ICD-9, ICD-10, and Systematized Nomenclature of Medicine codes in participants' EHRs. We estimated hazard ratios (HRs) and 95% CIs for the association of diabetes type with incident dementia using Cox proportional hazards models. Among 283,772 participants (mean [SD] age 64.62 [8.96] years; 56.7% women), 60.3% identified as non-Hispanic White and 13.3% as Hispanic/Latino. Optimal DM classification algorithm cutoffs varied by reference standard: self-reported diabetes: ≥1 T1DM EHR encounter (sensitivity: 0.59; specificity: 0.90) and C-peptide: ≥3 T1DM EHR encounters (sensitivity: 0.76; specificity: 0.79). Defining T1DM as having ≥1 T1DM encounter, 5,442 participants had T1DM. Compared with those without DM, participants with T1DM had higher dementia incidence (sociodemographic-adjusted HR 2.82; 95% CI 2.28-3.48) and those with T2DM also had elevated risk (sociodemographic-adjusted HR 2.08; 95% CI 2.87-2.31). Results were similar across sex, race, and ethnicity strata. In AoU, DM was associated with elevated dementia risk, with the highest risk among those with T1DM. These findings highlight the need to better understand mechanisms tying T1DM to dementia.
items.summary_ja:
背景：糖尿病（DM）は認知症リスクの既知の因子であるが、これまでの研究は主に2型糖尿病（T2DM）や糖尿病全般を対象としており、1型糖尿病（T1DM）と認知症リスクの関連は不明であった。  
方法：米国成人を対象としたAll of Us（AoU）コホートの電子カルテ（EHR）と調査データを用い、50歳以上の参加者約28万人を平均2.4年間追跡。T1DMとT2DMを区別するアルゴリズムを開発・検証し、ICDコードにより新規認知症発症を判定。コックス比例ハザードモデルで糖尿病タイプ別の認知症リスクを評価した。  
結果：T1DM患者5,442人は、糖尿病なし群と比較し認知症発症リスクが有意に高く（調整後ハザード比2.82、95%CI 2.28-3.48）、T2DM患者もリスク上昇が認められた（調整後HR 2.08、95%CI 2.87-2.31）。性別、人種、民族別でも同様の傾向を示した。  
結論：T1DMは認知症リスクを特に高めることが示され、T1DMと認知症の関連メカニズムの解明が重要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は米国のAll of Usコホートを用い、1型糖尿病（T1DM）と2型糖尿病（T2DM）が認知症発症リスクに与える影響を検討した。50歳以上の約28万人を対象に電子カルテ情報から糖尿病タイプを分類し、認知症発症を追跡。T1DM患者は非糖尿病者に比べ認知症リスクが約2.8倍、T2DM患者も約2.1倍高かった。性別・人種を問わず同様の傾向が認められ、T1DMと認知症の関連解明の重要性が示された。

items.title: Contingency of Plasma Dementia Biomarkers on Cognitive Profiles for Prognosis of Incident Dementia: The ARIC Study.
items.abstract: Plasma biomarkers such as phospho-tau species are increasingly used in clinical practice for the diagnosis of Alzheimer disease (AD). Phosphorylated-tau at threonine 181 (p-tau181) values also provide prognostic information about incident dementia. Cognitive status similarly conveys prognostic information, but the relationship between plasma biomarkers for AD and cognitive status requires clarification. Participants from the Atherosclerosis Risk in Communities (ARIC) study who were adjudicated as free of dementia in 2011-2013 had plasma samples analyzed for p-tau181 and other biomarkers. Participants were surveilled for incident dementia through December 31, 2022. Cumulative incidence curves, Cox models, and Fine-Gray models were used to evaluate the independent and combined discriminatory accuracy of cognitive status and plasma biomarkers for incident dementia. The sample comprised 1,577 ARIC participants (age 76.5 years, 60% women, 73% White, 27% Black). The risk of incident dementia was higher in persons with a baseline status of mild cognitive impairment (covariate-adjusted hazard ratio [HR] 2.94, 95% CI 2.61-3.33) compared with those who were cognitively unimpaired independent of biomarker status. The risk of dementia was also higher in persons with more abnormal concentrations of p-tau181 and other biomarkers independent of cognitive status. When age, cognitive status, and p-tau181 were included in the same models, the risk was attenuated relative to models where only cognitive status or plasma biomarkers were included. For continuous p-tau181 concentrations, the covariate-adjusted HR without cognitive status was 1.45 (95% CI 1.36-1.54), but when cognitive status was included, the HR decreased to 1.37 (95% CI 1.29-1.46). Models showed that when combined with age, p-tau181 alone, cognitive status alone, or the combination of p-tau181 and cognitive status had similar discriminatory accuracy. Cognitive status and plasma biomarker concentrations convey independent but overlapping information about the risk of incident dementia. Although cognitive status and plasma p-tau181 have similar discriminatory accuracies, the far lower incidence rate of dementia in persons who are initially cognitively unimpaired highlights the importance of an accurate clinical diagnosis.
items.summary_ja:
背景：アルツハイマー病（AD）の診断において、血漿中のリン酸化タウ（p-tau181）などのバイオマーカーが注目されているが、認知機能状態との関係は明確でない。  
方法：認知症がないと判定されたARIC研究参加者1,577名（平均年齢76.5歳）を対象に、2011-2013年に採取した血漿中のp-tau181などのバイオマーカーを測定し、2022年まで認知症発症を追跡。認知機能状態とバイオマーカーの独立および併用による認知症予測能を統計モデルで評価した。  
結果：軽度認知障害（MCI）群は認知機能正常群に比べ認知症リスクが約3倍高く（HR 2.94）、p-tau181の異常値も認知機能状態に関係なくリスク上昇に寄与した。年齢、認知機能状態、p-tau181を同時に考慮するとリスク推定はやや低下したが、認知機能状態単独、p-tau181単独、両者併用のいずれも同程度の予測精度を示した。  
結論：認知機能状態と血漿p-tau181は認知症リスクに関して独立かつ重複する情報を提供し、両者は同等の予測能力を持つ。特に認知機能正常者の認知症発症率が低いことから、正確な臨床診断の重要性が示唆された。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、認知機能状態と血漿中のリン酸化タウ（p-tau181）などのバイオマーカーが、認知症発症リスクの予測において独立かつ重複した情報を提供することを示した。認知機能障害や異常なp-tau181濃度はそれぞれ発症リスクを高めるが、両者を組み合わせた予測精度は単独使用と同程度であった。認知機能が正常な場合の発症率が低いことから、正確な臨床診断の重要性が強調される。

items.title: Association of White Matter Hyperintensities, Regional Brain Glucose Metabolism, and Cognitive Impairment in Aβ-Negative Patients.
items.abstract: Periventricular white matter hyperintensities (PWMHs) and regional brain glucose hypometabolism have each been linked to cognitive impairment, but their interplay independent of β-amyloid (Aβ) is unclear. This study examines whether PWMHs relate to region-specific cortical hypometabolism and metabolism mediates domain-specific cognition in Aβ-negative individuals.
